units.name: var-data.mount
units.contents:
[Unit]
Description=Mount data disk
What=/dev/disk/by-partlabel/data
Where=/var/data

[Mount]
What=/dev/disk/by-partlabel/data
Where=/var/data
Type=xfs

[Install]
WantedBy=local-fs.target

units.name: var-data-nfs-setup.service
units.contents:
[Unit]
Description=Create NFS export directory
After=var-data.mount
Requires=var-data.mount

[Service]
Type=oneshot
RemainAfterExit=yes
ExecStart=/usr/bin/mkdir -p /var/data/nfs

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target

units.name: nfs-server.service
units.contents:
[Unit]
Description=NFS Server Container
After=network-online.target var-data-nfs-setup.service
Requires=var-data-nfs-setup.service
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
TimeoutStartSec=300
ExecStartPre=-/usr/bin/podman rm -f nfs-server
ExecStart=/usr/bin/podman run --name nfs-server --rm --privileged --network host -v /var/data/nfs:/var/data/nfs -v /etc/exports.d/data.exports:/etc/exports:ro registry.gt.lo:5000/nfs-server:latest
ExecStop=/usr/bin/podman stop nfs-server
Restart=always
RestartSec=10

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
